css_layout_rules.topnav: position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; height: 64px; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
css_layout_rules.hero_summary_grid: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto;
css_layout_rules.hero_summary_md: @media(min-width:768px){ .hero-summary-inner { flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } }
css_layout_rules.stats_grid: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem; max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto;
css_layout_rules.three_col: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 0 1.5rem 2rem; max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto;
